# ACT Global Infrastructure

> Central automation, command center, public website, wiki, scripts, and operating knowledge for A Curious Tractor.

This file is the LLM-facing entrypoint for tools such as ChatGPT, Codex, Claude, and repo indexers.

## Start Here

- [Steering map](STEERING.md): where canonical truth lives in this repo.
- [Agent instructions](AGENTS.md): repo rules for coding agents.
- [Git branching and hygiene](docs/governance/git-branching.md): branch model and cleanup process.
- [Soul pointer](.soul): root pointer to the upstream philosophy file.
- [Canonical soul](wiki/concepts/soul.md): why ACT exists.
- [ACT identity](wiki/concepts/act-identity.md): what A Curious Tractor is.
- [LCAA method](wiki/concepts/lcaa-method.md): how ACT works.
- [ALMA](wiki/concepts/alma.md): Accountable Listening and Meaningful Action; how listening becomes accountable action.
- [Governed Proof](wiki/concepts/governed-proof.md): evidence, review, confidence, publication, and audit trail.
- [Four lanes](wiki/concepts/four-lanes.md): how money sustains the work.
- [ACT core facts](wiki/decisions/act-core-facts.md): canonical entity and operating facts.
- [Wiki index](wiki/index.md): main catalog for Tractorpedia.

## Codebase Map

- `apps/command-center/`: main dashboard and internal operating app.
- `apps/website/`: public website.
- `apps/command-center/src/app/api/`: Next.js API routes.
- `packages/`: shared packages.
- `scripts/`: operational scripts and automation.
- `scripts/lib/`: shared script modules.
- `config/`: shared configuration.
- `supabase/`: database migrations and Supabase configuration.
- `docs/architecture/`: system architecture and integration design.
- `wiki/`: canonical knowledge base.
- `thoughts/shared/`: plans, handoffs, reports, and working memory.
- `archive/`: read-only reference code. Do not add new features there.

## Canonical Knowledge Rules

- Philosophy, frameworks, methods, and taxonomies belong in `wiki/concepts/`.
- Settled decisions and canonical operating facts belong in `wiki/decisions/`.
- System and integration architecture belong in `docs/architecture/`.
- Plans and handoffs belong in `thoughts/shared/`; promote settled truth into `wiki/`.
- Root dotfiles such as `.soul` are pointers only, not duplicate sources of truth.
- Always spell out Accountable Listening and Meaningful Action (ALMA) on first use. Do not describe ALMA as the Soul, an AI agent, a ranking engine, or a measurement dashboard.

## Development Rules

- Read relevant files before editing.
- Keep changes scoped.
- Verify fixes before claiming they work.
- New dashboard UI goes in `apps/command-center/`.
- New public website UI goes in `apps/website/`.
- New API routes go in `apps/command-center/src/app/api/`.
- Do not add features to `archive/`.
- Before database work, verify the target Supabase project and schema.

## Public Wiki

- Public wiki host: `https://wiki.act.place`
- Soul alias: `https://wiki.act.place/.soul`
- Canonical local source for that alias: `wiki/concepts/soul.md`
